examiner_note: Đây là câu hỏi mở đầu về sở thích cá nhân. Bạn hãy thể hiện sự hào hứng (enthusiasm) và giải thích tại sao bạn lại thích hoặc không thích chụp ảnh. Đề cập đến việc lưu giữ kỷ niệm (preserving memories) hoặc niềm đam mê nghệ thuật (artistic passion) sẽ rất ghi điểm. Hãy sử dụng các từ như 'shutterbug', 'high-resolution', 'unfiltered' để câu chuyện thêm sinh động.

band7.text: Yes, I really like taking photos. It's a great way for me to keep track of my life and remember all the fun times I've had with my friends and family. I usually use my smartphone because it's very convenient and the quality is quite good these days.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, rõ ràng. Nêu được mục đích (keep track of life, remember fun times) và phương tiện (smartphone). Sử dụng từ vựng tự nhiên.

band8.text: Absolutely, I’m quite the shutterbug! I find photography to be a wonderful creative outlet. There's something incredibly satisfying about capturing a beautiful moment or a unique perspective. I love playing around with different editing apps to enhance the aesthetic of my shots before sharing them on social media.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng linh hoạt và thú vị (shutterbug, creative outlet, capturing a moment, unique perspective, enhance, aesthetic). Cách dẫn đạt trôi chảy.

band9.text: I’m an avid photography enthusiast, as I believe that a single image has the power to encapsulate an entire narrative. For me, taking photos is a form of visual journaling that allows me to document the fleeting beauty of everyday life. I’m particularly drawn to the technical aspects like composition and lighting, as well as the emotional resonance that a well-composed photograph can evoke. It’s a truly rewarding hobby that encourages me to observe the world more closely.
band9.note: Sử dụng vốn từ vựng cực kỳ phong phú và học thuật (avid, encapsulate, narrative, visual journaling, fleeting beauty, emotional resonance, well-composed, evoke). Cách lập luận vô cùng sâu sắc và triết lý.

v.meaning: người thích chụp ảnh/người mê máy ảnh
v.example: Ever since he got a camera for his birthday, he’s become a total shutterbug.

v.meaning: nơi giải tỏa sự sáng tạo
v.example: Painting provides a great creative outlet for her during stressful times.
The poem perfectly encapsulates the feeling of winter.

v.meaning: ghi nhật ký bằng hình ảnh
v.example: Instagram has become a popular platform for visual journaling.
Photography is about capturing the fleeting beauty of a sunset.
The movie's sad ending had a lot of emotional resonance for the audience.
A well-composed photograph can tell a thousand words.
The smell of fresh bread always evokes memories of my grandmother.
You need a fast shutter speed to capture moving objects clearly.
Adjusting the aperture helps control the amount of light entering the camera.
The photo came out dark because the exposure was too low.
The red dress serves as the focal point of the entire image.
Modern sensors can take high-resolution photos with incredible detail.
I prefer the raw, unfiltered look of natural light.
The minimalist design of the apartment is very aesthetic.
Candid shots often capture the most genuine emotions.
She specializes in taking beautiful black and white portraits.
The wide-angle lens is perfect for capturing large landscapes.
Macro photography allows you to see the tiny details on an insect's wing.

v.meaning: độ sâu trường ảnh/độ mờ hậu cảnh
v.example: A shallow depth of field makes the subject stand out against a blurred background.
I use a tripod when taking long exposure shots of the night sky.
Photography is all about understanding and using lighting conditions.
Photographers love the soft, warm light during the golden hour.

v.meaning: hậu kỳ/xỉnh sửa sau khi chụp
v.example: Post-processing is a vital step in professional digital photography.
I need to edit this video before I can upload it to YouTube.
This retro filter makes everything look like it was taken in the 70s.
I had to crop the photo to remove a person from the background.
Increasing the saturation makes the colors look more vivid.
High contrast photos have very bright highlights and dark shadows.

v.meaning: bị nhiễu/có hạt (ảnh chất lượng thấp)
v.example: Photos taken in low light often look grainy.
The sharpness of this lens is absolutely incredible.
The photo was blurry because my hand was shaking.
The background remains out of focus to emphasize the main subject.
Modern cameras have very fast and accurate autofocus systems.
I prefer using the viewfinder rather than the LCD screen.
Make sure you have a fast memory card for recording 4K video.

v.meaning: bộ sưu tập ảnh kỹ thuật số
v.example: I keep all my favorite vacation photos in a special digital gallery.

v.meaning: chia sẻ trên mạng xã hội
v.example: Social media sharing has changed how we consume photography.
The photo of the cat became viral overnight.
Rule of thirds is a basic principle of good composition.
Architectural photography often relies on symmetry for a clean look.
Managing shadows and highlights is key to a balanced exposure.
If a photo is underexposed, you lose a lot of detail in the dark areas.
The sky in the photo is overexposed and looks completely white.
A wide-angle lens is great for capturing tight spaces or vast horizons.
Wildlife photographers use telephoto lenses to capture animals from a distance.
The main subject of the portrait is a young girl with flowers.
Natural elements like tree branches are perfect for framing a landscape.
Changing your perspective can make a familiar place look entirely different.
The market was a riot of vivid colors and loud noises.
